note: The canonical trivial proof. Kernel-accepted (verified Lean 4.31, term mode).
Reflexivity of equality under a binder. Tactic mode; wrapper prefixes `by`.
Left zero identity. Definitional (Nat.add recurses on the right arg, so n+0 reduces); proved by rfl. Verified Lean 4.31.
Right zero identity. NOT definitional (0+n needs Nat.zero_add), so rfl fails; omega proves Presburger arithmetic including this. Verified Lean 4.31.

proposition: ∀ (a b : Prop), a ∧ b → b ∧ a
note: Conjunction commutativity, term mode. The anonymous-constructor ⟨⟩ destructures in the fun binder. Verified Lean 4.31.
